goal: Use real MeowTarot card-back art in the desktop homepage hero fan instead of the placeholder gradient/'M' cards.
done: Replaced the three .mtd-card placeholders (CSS gradient + 'M' monogram) with loading our deck backs (veila-tarot left, moonmallow center, boba-oracle right) from cdn.meowtarot.com/assets//00-back.webp, matching the deck gallery. Added .mtd-card__art (absolute inset:0, object-fit:cover) and dropped the .mtd-card::before inner-border pseudo. EN (index.html) + TH (th/index.html) parity; CSS in css/desktop-home.css. Verified headless at 1440px: three real backs fan correctly with the float animation.
